chapter_title_en: Challenges to and Restoration of the Congress System

points_en: Jawaharlal Nehru passed away in May 1964, raising the question of leadership.
K. Kamaraj managed transition and Lal Bahadur Shastri became PM.
Shastri faced food crisis and 1965 war and gave slogan 'Jai Jawan Jai Kisan'.
After his death, Indira Gandhi defeated Morarji Desai.
points_hi: शास्त्री ने 'जय जवान जय किसान' दिया।
इंदिरा गांधी ने देसाई को हराया।
